name: research-draft-edit
label: Pipeline
situation: I want to research a topic, draft from it, then proofread it into one finished article
skeleton:
1) Run the research stage → produce a source list.
2) [exit gate 1] Check that the source list qualifies as input for the next stage (draft) — if it is empty or malformed, do not pass it on; report at the current stage.
3) Run the draft stage (input = source list) → produce an article.
4) [exit gate 2] Check that the article qualifies as input for the next stage (proofread).
5) Run the proofread stage (input = article) → produce the proofread article final.md.
6) [verifier] Review final.md in a SEPARATE pass — not right after making it (maker ≠ checker). At the same time, confirm that every stage's exit-gate pass was logged.
7) [hardstop] If a single stage fails twice, halt the pipeline and report which stage got stuck and why (do not proceed to the next stage).

registry.gate: each stage's exit gate — proceed only when the next-stage input qualification passes
registry.verifier: an exit gate at every stage (next-stage input qualification) + review of the final artifact final.md in a pass separate from its creator (maker ≠ checker)
registry.hardstop: 2 retries per stage · overall time/cost cap · halt the pipeline and report at the current stage if one stage fails twice
registry.accepted_signal: final.md exists + a pass log for all three stages' exit gates (research · draft · proofread)
